note: S8. The plan optimizer weighs a distance against a predicate eval; this is their measured ratio (worst-ISA scalar, engine-conditional per C-6). DIST_COST_MILLI=1000 is the numeraire. A microbench, not a corpus sweep -- the ratio is a property of the kernels, not the data. Clamped to [0.05, 1.0] so microbench noise cannot commit an absurd coefficient; the plan choice needs the magnitude, not three digits.
